name: studio
description: Studio — Declarative YAML runtime for AI agents (monorepo)
author: Ariane Guay

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @studio-foundation/contracts build && pnpm --filter @studio-foundation/anonymizer build && pnpm --filter @studio-foundation/ralph build && pnpm --filter @studio-foundation/runner build && pnpm --filter @studio-foundation/engine build && pnpm --filter @studio-foundation/api build && pnpm --filter @studio-foundation/cli build
